top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Retail Traders Chase Shiny Objects But Refuse to Bet on S&P 500
top_signals.summary: Retail traders, some of the staunchest supporters of the stock market this decade, are showing signs of waning conviction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AlphaQuest Founder Lost Control at Quant Fund, Investor Alleges
top_signals.summary: AlphaQuest founder Nigol Koulajian admitted losing control of trading at his $2 billion quantitative hedge fund before announcing plans to shut it down, an institutional investor claimed in a lawsuit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta, Circle, Vodafone, Intel and more - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta, Circle, Vodafone, Intel and more  CNBC
